race.comment: Good little race. The late betting will be key with the Symon Wilde-trained FROM A DISTANCE (5) who resumes. He hasn't been seen since winning the Silverbowl Series Final at Flemington in July, smashing the talented Knobelas on that occasion. That was over 1600m and this is going to be on the sharp side but the stable is sharp and will no doubt have kept him very fresh to be charging late. Also wary of MOBY DICK (2) who is now with Gavin Bedggood who is very good with these tried horses. His best is absolutely good enough. SALSA FELLOW (1) won well enough last start at Terang on heavy ground in a BM78, adding to his strong wet track record. He'll be back and charging out wide. EMMADELLA (3) resumes for the Dabernig yard, formerly with John Thompson. Off a very long break, watch the market for the sharp local yard. SOUTHERN CRESCENT (10) ran on well for third at Geelong last time and has each-way claims.

Live1.SchedulerNote: *P1 [Provincial] Warrnambool May Racing Carnival - Prize Money: $50,000
